displayTitle: X-Wing Rogue Squadron #24: In the Empire's Service, Part 4
synopsis: Baron Fel's wingmen—the merciless pilots of the Imperial 181st Fighter Division—are falling to the firepower of Rogue Squadron. But Fel himself is not down. He has a final card to play, and Wedge Antilles is about to fold!
title: X-Wing Rogue Squadron #24: In the Empire's Service, Part 4
